Class GameObject

java.lang.Object
engine.GameObject
All Implemented Interfaces:
IGameObject
public class GameObject extends Object implements IGameObject
Representa um objeto.

    insertElements(ITransform transform, ICollider collider, IShape shape, IBehaviour behaviour)
    always call this after initializing a GameObject collider and shape always depend on transform behaviour can depend on anything depending on implementation dont set dependable members to null

  • Constructor Details

    • GameObject

      public GameObject(String name, double x, double y, int layer, double angle, double scale, Figure fig)
      Construtor da classe GameObject.
      Parameters:
      name - Nome do objeto.
      x - Posição X inicial.
      y - Posição Y inicial.
      layer - Camada do objeto.
      angle - Ângulo de rotação inicial.
      scale - Fator de escala inicial.
      fig - Figura associada ao objeto.

    • GameObject

      public GameObject(String name, double x, double y, int layer, double angle, double scale, Figure fig, IBehaviour behaviour)

    • GameObject

      public GameObject(String name)

  • Method Details

    • insertElements

      public void insertElements(ITransform transform, ICollider collider, IShape shape, IBehaviour behaviour)
      always call this after initializing a GameObject collider and shape always depend on transform behaviour can depend on anything depending on implementation dont set dependable members to null

      Retorna o nome do objeto.
